## Checklist
- [ ] Script has `#! python3` on line 1
- [ ] `bundle.yaml` filled in (title, tooltip, author, min_revit_ver: 2023)
- [ ] Button name added to the panel's `.layout` file
- [ ] Tested in Revit 2023 or newer
- [ ] No hardcoded file paths or user-specific values
